1. [completed] [main-agent] Clarify the IPL 2025 bowling metric and identify the source data available in the workspace.
2. [completed] [mcp-executor] Compute the leading bowler(s) using the available dataset and derive the ranking table.
3. [pending] [tool-executor] Generate a clear, engaging data blog post with narrative writing, charts, and tables. 4. [pending] [tool-executor] Print the path of the generated HTML file.
